description: Two-part graphic combining a black-and-white photo of President Donald Trump with a data chart. In the top half, a high-contrast monochrome photograph shows Trump in a dark suit, white shirt and tie with an American flag lapel pin, mid-gesture pointing to his left, set inside what appears to be an industrial hangar or factory; presidential flags and a banner reading 'JO...' are partly visible at right, including the circular Seal of the President of the United States. The bottom half overlays a white bar chart titled in bold blue text 'President Trump is reversing Biden's industrial decay.' with the subtitle 'ISM PMI Manufacturing, points above/below the expansion threshold.' The chart runs monthly from Nov-2022 to Mar-2026: long navy-blue negative bars in the Biden-era months (mostly between -1 and -4), then red bars in 2025 that rise toward and above zero, ending with three tall positive red bars in Jan-Mar 2026 (reaching about +2.6). A footnote reads 'Note: CEA analysis of ISM data.'
notable_text: President Trump is reversing Biden's industrial decay. / ISM PMI Manufacturing, points above/below the expansion threshold / Note: CEA analysis of ISM data.
